item.dc:creator: andante89

item.title: Random Birthday Dump
item.description:
It's my birthday today, I work til 8 pm.
Currently at my sister's house working because I live in St Petersburg FL and my office building had the first 2 floors take heavy damage and flooding and it's closed.
My house took 6 feet of water and isn't livable atm
I saved my clothes, my computer and my art so I got that going for me.
Really glad it wasn't worse.
Looking forward to getting some sushi later after work and enjoying tomorrow off
FP Edit: Having a rough week plz send some good advice or funny memes
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

item.title: Every being's heart can feel affections
item.dc:creator: TheWhatever666

item.title: After 7 months of living in my truck, I finally found a home!
item.description: I moved into my truck in April following the destruction of my cabin (long story). I went tree planting and finished the season in July. I started looking for a place, but having 2 dogs makes makes it a tough go. I finally found a good place with some good roommates, and I move in November 1st. I love being mobile, but 7 months in the back of a truck with 2 active dogs gets to you after a bit. Here's a dog tax featuring the 2 critters in question. They're named Sköll and Hati, and they're my best buds.
item.dc:creator: weareheretodrinkyourbeer

item.title: She cant sleep without her sister
item.dc:creator: TheWhatever666

item.title: My beautiful boy Mango left us today
item.description: Today I lost one of the best friends a man could ever have. Mango was just about to turn 10 years old, but was taken from us by paralysis ticks. I rescued him as a feral kitten, and in return he was a fluffy guardian angel for me and my family for a decade. I can't describe how much pain we're in now, but it was an honour to share my life with this most noble of creatures.
item.dc:creator: LDRcycles

item.title: My childhood dream cosplay finally done - Selene cosplay from Underworld by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/reel/DBRvkZfSWv_/ Hello everyone! Sharing a little video of my Selene cosplay from the movie Underworld, it meant a lot to me to finally be able to cosplay her for this year's Halloween season, she's such an underrated character. I wish you all an amazing day Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Behind closed doors, Trump mocks his supporters
item.description:
Part 1
Part 2 I don’t understand why so many high-level executives in Trump administration seem to have those crazy eyes. Glad some of them have chosen to speak up.

item.title: Ohhh BURN!!! Nailed it!!
item.description: People need acceptance, everyone should be able to live the life they were born to live. Sometimes people are born in the wrong body, and that's ok... They have to fight so many battles just to live in a body and gender they feel themselves in, they don't need hate, or pressure to be someone they're not!! It's 2024, be on the good side of history ffs!!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.dc:creator: JebidiahBeetus

item.title: Donald Trump shows signs of dementia
item.description: Harry Segal is a senior lecturer in the Psychology Department at Cornell University and in the Psychiatry Department at Weill Cornell Medicine. He says Trump’s awkward display at his rally was another clear sign of mental decline. Segal says: “What’s alarming is how the rate of Trump’s bizarre speech and political decisions have been increasing. He gave an answer about childcare to the Economic Club of New York so incoherent that even his supporters were concerned. Last week he got cognitively lost in a rally and began to talk about the ‘eight circles’ that Biden filled up with journalists. No one on his staff has been able to explain the reference. “Trump has shown evidence of dementia for the past year as indicated by his strange gait, phonemic paraphasia—when he begins a word and can’t finish it—and decline in the complexity of his words and concepts. This limited capacity explains his poor debate performance, but there are two more disturbing signs of his decline. “First, he is avoiding events where he has to respond coherently and spontaneously: He has refused a second presidential debate and abruptly cancelled a 60 Minutes interview. Second, he has become more impulsive, another sign of incipient dementia. This explains his strange behavior in Philadelphia – his abrupt decision to play DJ is yet another sign of his accelerating cognitive decline.” https://as.cornell.edu/news/trumps-abrupt-decision-play-dj-sign-accelerating-cognitive-decline-says-cornell-expert Video https://meidasnews.com/news/new-meidastouch-video-highlights-the-warning-signs-exhibited-by-demented-don
item.dc:creator: AjKaramba

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 66 (incredibly mysterious)
item.description:
Unhappily for us all! Hello and welcome to yet another meme dump, my imgur friends. The depression monster has been lurking this week, threatening to eat me (and not even in the fun way). Join me in viewing amusing images to distract from the frustration that is existence. Onwards!
Thanks, god
I'll be lurking about this Halloween, see if you can spot me
so cryptic, much allure. wow. very mystery.
super fucken weird
¯\_(ツ)_/¯
if not friend, why friend shaped?
I miss the days when every CD came with am album sleeve that included all the lyrics
but in the end, it doesn't even matter All righty, you've made it to the end of this dump! Until next time imgur friends, don't forget to be awesome.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy
